faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Flatlands homes?
faqs.answer: Flatlands residents most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, flour beetles, weevils, and cigarette beetles. These pests infest dry goods like flour, cereal, pasta, rice, nuts, and dried fruits. They can enter homes through purchased groceries or find their way inside through small cracks and gaps.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a pantry pest problem in Flatlands?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Flatlands, Brooklyn. Our team understands that pantry pest infestations need immediate attention to prevent further contamination of food supplies. Weekend and evening appointments are available to accommodate your schedule.

faqs.question: What does your pantry pest control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350-$550 pantry pest service includes a thorough inspection to identify infested products and entry points, removal guidance for contaminated items, targeted treatment of affected areas, application of safe residual products, and preventative recommendations. We also provide follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination of the infestation.

faqs.question: How can I prevent pantry pests from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Store dry goods in airtight glass or plastic containers, regularly clean pantry shelves and corners, inspect groceries before storing them, rotate older items to the front, and maintain proper sealing around windows and doors. We provide detailed prevention tips specific to your Flatlands home during our service visit to help keep pantry pests away long-term.
